mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the target horizon.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of low-rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in real retail sales signals weakening consumer demand, which reduces corporate revenue expectations and drives negative equity returns over a quarter.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% month-over-month for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65% of instances when the trigger activates.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment indicates structural labor market weakness, compressing earnings forecasts and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with a win rate above 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, which triggers short-term positive equity repricing.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero with a p-value greater than 0.10 during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp monthly increases in consumer prices trigger immediate equity sell-offs as investors anticipate tighter monetary policy and margin compression.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in greater than 60% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in real GDP growth and housing starts indicates a broad-based demand contraction that depresses corporate profit expectations over a quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a positive return win rate exceeding 58% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates directly reduce aggregate consumer spending power and increase recession probability, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between unemployment changes and 20-day returns remains below 0.04 across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production indices exceeding historical expansion thresholds signal robust supply-side activity that supports short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of instances when the threshold is crossed.
